ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., NFC, AFC) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., East, West) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home stadium (city, state) */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the team's primary and secondary colors */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the team's social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_weeks" INTEGER /* Number of regular season weeks */,
  "playoff_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the playoffs */,
  "super_bowl" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the season ended in a Super Bowl */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the Super Bowl (if applicable) */,
  "playoff_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's season performance */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "win_loss_percentage" REAL /* Win-loss percentage */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points allowed */,
  "point_differential" INTEGER /* Point differential */,
  "margin_of_victory" REAL /* Average margin of victory */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the team in the season */,
  "playoff_appearance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team made it to the playoffs */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses */,
  "playoff_margin_of_victory" REAL /* Average margin of victory in the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_outcome" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., 'W' for win, 'L' for loss, 'T' for tie) */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the referees' names */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game's statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Points allowed by the team */,
  "first_downs" INTEGER /* Number of first downs */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "pass_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards */,
  "rush_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "time_of_possession" TEXT /* Time of possession for the team */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties committed by the team */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards lost due to penalties */,
  "third_down_conversions" INTEGER /* Number of successful third-down conversions */,
  "fourth_down_conversions" INTEGER /* Number of successful fourth-down conversions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach's tenure */,
  "previous_team" TEXT /* Previous team the coach worked for */,
  "coach_bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "coach_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "coach_social_media" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the coach's social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the player */,
  "player_email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "player_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the player's social media handles */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "pass_completions" INTEGER /* Number of pass completions */,
  "pass_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of pass attempts */,
  "pass_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards */,
  "pass_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Passing touchdowns */,
  "pass_interceptions" INTEGER /* Interceptions thrown */,
  "rush_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rush_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards */,
  "rush_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Rushing touchdowns */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Receiving yards */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Receiving touchdowns */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks by the player */,
  "sack_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards lost due to sacks */,
  "interceptions_returned" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions returned for touchdowns */,
  "fumbles_forced" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles forced by the player */,
  "fumbles_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles recovered by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ankle sprain, knee injury) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., out, doubtful, probable) */,
  "estimated_return_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of return from injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "injury_location" TEXT /* Location of the injury on the body */,
  "injury_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the injury in days */,
  "injury_doctor" TEXT /* Name of the doctor treating the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team staff, analyst, public user) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_social_media" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the user's social media handles */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
